assemblies.label: Assembly

assemblies.label: Assembly
assemblies.function: 三轴向级+单级离心叶轮，将进气压缩后送入燃烧室

assemblies.label: Assembly
assemblies.function: 转子动平衡补偿，消除转子不平衡量

assemblies.label: Assembly
assemblies.function: 导流：将一级压缩后的气流整流引导入二级转子

assemblies.label: Assembly
assemblies.function: 导流：将二级压缩后气流整流引导入三级转子

assemblies.label: Assembly
assemblies.function: 导流+引气：整流并通过槽孔向引气阀腔室引出级间压力P2.5

assemblies.label: Assembly
assemblies.function: 支撑压气机后轮毂（后端），承受轴向推力（球轴承）

assemblies.label: Assembly
assemblies.function: 主承力结构；容纳压气机、燃烧室、涡轮；承载附件安装面

assemblies.label: Assembly
assemblies.function: 引导进气；承载1号轴承和一级静子后端；支撑附件齿轮箱

assemblies.label: Assembly
assemblies.name_zh: 中央防火隔框（中心隔热环）
assemblies.function: 在压气机进气区与发动机前端之间形成防火隔断

assemblies.label: Assembly
assemblies.function: 在压气机进气区与附件齿轮箱之间形成防火隔断

assemblies.label: Assembly
assemblies.function: 防止压气机喘振：在设定转速以下将级间压力P2.5排向大气

assemblies.label: Assembly
assemblies.function: 一级和三级静子通过螺栓连为一体；二级静子夹持在其间

procedures.label: Procedure
procedures.name_en: Removal of Pre-SB1445 Center Fireseal Mount Ring
procedures.description: Remove external lines through ring; remove nuts/bolts at flanges; remove nuts/washers/bolts securing ring halves to GGC brackets; remove ring halves.

procedures.label: Procedure
procedures.name_en: Removal of Post-SB1445 Center Fireseal Mount Ring
procedures.description: (1)Remove power section. (2)Remove external lines. (3)Remove combustion chamber liner. (4)Remove joining nuts(9) and bolts(7). (5)Remove mounting nuts(6)/washers(5)/bolts(1) and vane segment strips(2). (6)Remove ring halves(4,10).

procedures.label: Procedure
procedures.name_en: Installation of Pre-SB1445 Center Fireseal Mount Ring
procedures.description: Position ring halves on GGC and secure to brackets; torque 32-36 lb.in. Join at flanges with bolts and self-locking nuts (bottom-left, top-right); torque 32-36 lb.in. Reinstall external lines.

procedures.label: Procedure
procedures.name_en: Installation of Post-SB1445 Center Fireseal Mount Ring
procedures.description: (1)Apply silicone adhesive PWC08-002 to GGC mating surfaces and bolt shanks. (2)Position top half(4). (3)Install vane strips(2) inside GGC; finger-tighten washers(5)/nuts(6). (4)Position bottom half(10). (5)Install vane strips. (6)Join halves at flanges with bolts(7)/nuts(9). (7)Torque all 21 mounting positions 45-55 lb.in. (8)Torque flange nuts(9) 32-36 lb.in. (9)Install combustion chamber liner. (10)Install power section. (11)Install external lines.

procedures.label: Procedure
procedures.name_zh: 燃气发生器组件拆卸（大修级）
procedures.name_en: Removal of Gas Generator Assembly (Heavy Maintenance)
procedures.description: (a)Remove engine from airframe; install in stand. (b)Remove power section from GGA. (c)Remove CPR turbine disk and blade assembly. (d)Remove combustion chamber liner. (e)Remove CPR turbine vane ring/shroud housing/exit ducts.

procedures.label: Procedure
procedures.name_zh: 燃气发生器组件安装（大修级）
procedures.description: (a)Install vane ring/shroud/exit ducts. (b)Install combustion chamber liner. (c)Install CPR turbine disk and blade assembly. (d)Install power section on GGA. (e)Install engine in airframe.

procedures.label: Procedure
procedures.name_zh: 燃气发生器机匣外部检查
procedures.description: Examine for cracks, distortion, corrosion, overheating evidence. Machined surfaces: corrosion pitting <0.010 in deep and <75% surface area acceptable. Examine engine mounts (installed) or mounting pads/threaded holes (uninstalled). Inspect shanknuts in No.2 bearing flange area.

procedures.label: Procedure
procedures.name_zh: 一级压气机转子叶片检查（目视）
procedures.description: Triggered by each removal of air inlet screen. Use mirror due to limited access. Assess FOD, nicks, tears, cracks, erosion against limits in §5.C and §5.D. Document damage per §5.B.

procedures.label: Procedure
procedures.description: Record: engine module TSN/TSO, cycles, component description, damage location and dimensions. If blade repaired, record material removed (cutback amount).

procedures.label: Procedure
procedures.name_zh: 一级叶片前缘修锉修理
procedures.description: (1)Mask entire 1st stage area to contain titanium filings. (2)Blend/cutback using fine hand files and stones within limits: LE cutback max 0.025 in (extendable to 0.050 in). Blend limit: 0.300 in wide x 0.165 in deep, ≥0.220 in from tip. Tip bend: 0.375 in wide x 0.280 in deep. (3)If any blade at max limit, blend blade 180° opposite identically to prevent imbalance. (4)Clean inlet area with suction cleaner; remove all masking and filing residue. (5)Verify engine performance.

procedures.label: Procedure
procedures.description: Dents/nicks ≤0.050 in deep/wide, ≥0.200 in apart, ≥0.250 in from tip (max 4/blade): smooth sharp corners to ≈0.050 in radius, max 0.050 in deep/wide. Tip corner radius ≤0.100 in. Clean inlet area completely.

procedures.label: Procedure
procedures.description: (1)Remove air inlet screen. (2)Loosen coupling nut; remove right-hand spray tube from tee. (3)Remove cover; remove tee from left-hand spray tube by loosening coupling nut.
